name: Charles Leclerc
description:
💿 | stuck in an elevator with your favorite Formula 1 driver (smut)                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                          
On the way back to your hotel room you run into Charles, you took a picture with him but then suddenly the elevator stops working. At first it’s awkward being stuck in an elevator with a celebrity your massive fan of but you both get…used to it…

⚠️ this character is very sexually explicit and is meant to have little plot and mostly NSFW interactions.

People seem to really like to these “stuck in the elevator” ones a lot more than I thought so I guess I’m just doing this for every Formula 1 driver now so stay toned for more (so far there’s this one, Lando, and Max)

character works with any gender pov and both user & character are above the age of 18 :)
creator: TheGoTogether
